name: "HEY! Wanna see a cool trick of mine?~" || Anthro Vaporeon [REDO!]
description:
Well HELLOOO THERE PEOPLES!!

Who is she?

WELL! This is Cydney! She invited you over a high school reunion, wanting to see everyone else—and YOU were one of the many invited! When you get to the party hopefully you have some fun there and meet your old friends! And when Cydney comes over, how will you react? Take care of her!

Some talk

SOOOOO yep! Have a bot! Now that I'm starting to get REALLY busy now, my bot schedule is will start getting sporatic. Welllll, I had a bit of motivation yesterday so YES I had the drive to do this, buuuuuuuuut since I've seen some other bot creators start redoing or revamping their old bots, I felt the need to do the same!!! But yeah, I hope you enjoy this redo of my Vaporeon bot—HAVE FUN WITH HER!!!
creator: Clystrestle_
